title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Flipkart Logistics! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Flipkart Logistics:
Flipkart Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
